sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n26747" key="dizugh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δι-ζῠγής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, <sense id="n26747.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">δίζυξ, πῆχυς</ref> </xr> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">containing two bones,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Heliod.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:44:23:26" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">44.23.26</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
